name: Marinade and Basting Sauce for Lamb
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a bowl and stir until well mixed.
2. Marinate the lamb for at least 2 hours before barbequing.
3. Baste the lamb frequently with the sauce while cooking over a Chinese smoke over or charcoal grill.
4. The sauce will serve about 6 chops or a 3-5 pound roast.
